title: Today's Workout
setUpDesc: Configure your training preferences to get personalized workout recommendations.
restDayDesc: Your body needs recovery. Take it easy today.
activeRecoveryDesc: Consider a light walk or yoga instead of cycling today.
howRecommendedIntro: Recommendations use your training preferences (goal, duration, days per week, level) and, when available, your readiness for the day.
howRecommendedToday: Today / this week: If you use Garmin or have PMC data (CTL/TSB), we use Body Battery, sleep, stress, and form to decide between rest, light activity, or a workout and which intensity (recovery to VO2max) fits best.
howRecommendedGoal: Your goal (e.g. FTP, endurance, race prep) shifts recommendations toward the right workout types.
howRecommendedDuration: Preferred duration and level (beginner/intermediate/advanced) filter and rank workouts so they match your schedule and experience.
howRecommendedFullPlan: Full plan: For future dates we assume a neutral readiness and vary workouts so you don't get the same session every day. When you reach that day, the suggestion can be updated based on your actual readiness.
reasonRecommendedWorkout: Recommended a {{category}} workout based on your current readiness.
reasonRestDay: Rest day recommended - your body needs recovery.
reasonLightWalk: Consider a light walk or other low-impact activity instead of cycling today.
